title: Sistema Ultra Airtight Pantry Storage Container | 920 ml Square Food Storage Container | Stackable | with Locking Clips | BPA-Free | Clear with Black Accents
features: Sleek and stylish design makes them ideal for displaying cereal, ingredients, snacks and more on your kitchen counter or in a tidy pantry
Made from premium quality, ultra-clear plastic with glass-like clarity, allowing you to easily see the contents of the container
Easy-locking clips and air tight seals keep food deliciously fresh
Stackable storage design with ridged lids ensure they take up less valuable space in kitchen cupboards and drawers
Phthalate and BPA-free plastic; top rack dishwasher-safe; fridge and freezer-safe; microwave-safe without lid; designed and made in New Zealand
description: From the manufacturer High quality, airtight, ultra clear containers Sistema Ultra clear containers can be stored perfectly in kitchen drawers, pantry, fridge and on the counter top. Simply place your food into the container and close the distinctive Sistema easy-locking clips to seal. The modular design stacks perfectly for efficient storage with an airtight seal that keeps ingredients fresh. Made from high quality, ultra clear plastic with glass like clarity, allowing you to easily see the contents of the container. Impact-resistant TRITAN plastic can be used without fear of shattering. The ultra clear lids make these containers perfect for storage in kitchen drawers. Modular design stacks perfectly for efficient storage. Why You'll Love It Space Saving Stacking System Sistema Ultra container lids have ridges for easy and secure stacking. Available in 4 convenient sizes; 460ml, 700ml, 920ml & 1.3 Litre. Durable Sistema Ultra containers are made from impact-resistant TRITAN plastic that has glass like clarity and can be used without fear of shattering. Dishwasher Safe For easy clean up, Sistema Ultra storage containers and lids can go in the dishwasher (top rack). Made in New Zealand Made in our state of the art factory in Auckland, New Zealand.
